title: Prophage genomics.
author: Canchaya C Proux C Fournous G Bruttin A Brussow H
content: S-EPMC156470 PMC156470 Prophage genomics. The majority of the bacterial genome sequences deposited in the National Center for Biotechnology Information database contain prophage sequences. Analysis of the prophages suggested that after being integrated into bacterial genomes, they undergo a complex
